description_long: This object consists of two distinct seating units: a large, deep blue sofa and a smaller, orange armchair. The blue sofa features a boxy, modern design with straight lines, a high backrest, and wide, flat armrests, comfortably seating two to three people. The orange armchair mirrors the sofa's geometric style, with a similarly high backrest and broad, squared armrests, but is sized for a single occupant. Both pieces rest on short, metallic sled-style legs that slightly elevate them above the ground, giving a contemporary appearance. The upholstery on both units appears smooth and solid-colored, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching. The overall look is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban public spaces such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor plazas.
description: A modern, boxy blue sofa paired with a matching orange armchair, both with smooth upholstery and metallic sled legs. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange armchair and the side profile of the blue sofa, highlighting their boxy shapes and wide armrests.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the backrests of both the blue sofa and orange armchair, emphasizing their high, straight backs and metallic legs.
description_view_2: Side view with the blue sofa's full length and the orange armchair's back, showcasing the depth and uniformity of the cushions.
description_view_3: Front view of the blue sofa and side of the orange armchair, clearly showing the seating surfaces and cushion arrangement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: The blue sofa has two large, attached seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all uniform in size and shape; the orange armchair has a single seat and back cushion, also attached and uniform.
attribute_armrest_style: Both units feature wide, straight, boxy armrests at seat height, with a flat profile and no decorative elements or padding contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Each piece has four short, metallic sled-style legs positioned at the corners, with a simple, exposed, and slightly curved design.
attribute_backrest_type: The backrests are high, straight, and continuous, matching the width of the seat cushions, with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid-colored and smooth, with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
